summary: Reference‑standard soundboard recording with crystal‑clear audio, highlighted by a surprise China → Rider close and high‑energy renditions of The Race Is On, Good Times Roll, Samson and Ship of Fools.
review: The GD‑89‑05‑06 board capture is frequently described as “reference quality,” delivering crisp dynamics that let every instrument shine.  The show itself is praised for a relaxed, family‑vibe first set that ends with the now‑legendary China → Rider segue and a second set that peaks on Samson, Ship of Fools and several fan‑favorite cuts.  While most listeners rave about the performance, a handful note muddy vocals and a few weaker Brent‑song moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Over two‑dozen reviews overwhelmingly rate the recording 5 stars and praise both sound quality and performance; only a few low‑star comments temper the average, yielding a strong positive rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, dynamic and reference‑standard board mix with no noticeable dropouts; one comment about possible channel reversal but overall clarity is praised throughout.

poor_songs: I Will Take You Home (negative remarks)
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set rolls gently with a relaxed, backyard‑party vibe and the surprise China → Rider closer, while the second set builds momentum through Samson, Ship of Fools and a soaring finish that many fans cite as the show’s high point.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Consistently praised for energetic playing and superb guitar tone; a few reviewers note his vocals sounded muddy on this night.
band_member_comments.Bob: One reviewer complained about his screaming on "Around and Around"; otherwise not mentioned.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s organ work is highlighted as fiery and a fan favorite, though his vocal‑centric songs receive mixed reactions.
